overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered market street. The scene begins at a table with a magazine and proceeds forward past neon signs, vendor stalls, and NPCs in a futuristic urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway entrance with neon signage

events.description: camera begins moving forward from the table into the walkway
moving deeper into the covered area away from the starting position

agents.ego_description: starting from a table with a magazine and walking forward through the covered market entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and standing near the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: metal table with Night City Journal magazine and ashtray
magazine with headline ON A ROLL and cigarette butts in tray
neon sign reading PieZ on the left wall
large TECHNOLOGIC billboard with purple and blue colors
overhead metal and concrete structure covering the walkway
small green metal stool on the concrete ground
chain-link metal fence running along the left wall
market stall with glass front and cyan neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from a first-person perspective at a metal table with a Night City Journal magazine in a covered market walkway. Bright sunlight streams in from the far end of the corridor. The camera begins walking forward past neon signs including PieZ and TECHNOLOGIC, approaching a green stool and concrete planters in the middle of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with vendor stalls

events.description: approaching a woman in red boots leaning against the fence on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market, passing concrete planters and approaching a woman standing by the fence

notable_agents.action: woman in red boots and short skirt leaning against the metal fence, looking at her phone

entered.detail: neon sign for a bar with pink and blue lighting in the distance
metal staircase leading to an upper level on the right side

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered walkway, the camera moves past the green stool and concrete planters. A woman in distinctive red boots leans against the chain-link fence on the left. The vendor stall with cyan neon lighting becomes more prominent on the right, and a metal staircase becomes visible further ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway approaching open intersection

events.description: passing the woman leaning on the fence on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the woman and moving deeper toward the bright exit at the end of the walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket standing near the vendor stall ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the woman leaning against the fence and continues toward the bright sunlight at the end of the covered walkway. The vendor stall remains visible on the right while the metal fence recedes into the distance on the left. The scene approaches the open exit where more pedestrians are visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a shaded, neon-lit market corridor that gradually opens into a bright, sun-drenched urban plaza. It begins at a metal table featuring a Night City Journal magazine, moving forward past glowing PieZ and TECHNOLOGIC signs toward concrete planters and a green stool. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past a woman in red boots leaning against a chain-link fence while a cyan-lit vendor stall becomes more prominent on the right. The perspective then continues toward a distant metal staircase, with the fence receding on the left as the lighting transitions from artificial neon to intense natural light. Finally, the camera emerges from the covered walkway into the open exit, revealing a wider city vista populated by distant pedestrians.
